rationale: WP-A: a standalone retracts statement of the PINNED signer over the attached, verified target. lineage VERIFIED (the declaration resolves); reject_retracted makes continued automated use of the target an exit-3 block. The target stays cryptographically valid for its bytes — a retracts sets a visible state, it is never a crypto kill.
testKeys: fresh throwaway keys, generated by conformance/relation/generate_vectors.py
